internal_consistency.justification: All 5 modules follow the same conventions: JSDoc @typedef at top, @param/@returns on exports, UserError class, atomic write pattern. Naming and structure are uniform.

intentionality.justification: Validation schemas are specific to state.json and features.json structures. Circular dep detection uses project-specific feature graph. Error messages reference actual field names and values.

craft.justification: Consistent file headers, JSDoc blocks, function ordering. spawnSync args array properly replaces shell string. Atomic write uses .tmp+rename consistently.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: Error messages are actionable for AI agents (include field names, expected types, available options). JSON output is parseable. Subcommand help text updated.
